title: Le MonPack 4
description:
A peaceful Cobblemon modpack.
Build, decorate and catch 'em all with complete peace of mind. Again !
body:
![Le MonPack 4](https://i.imgur.com/Dwt4wga.png)

## A Pokémon universe

With the Cobblemon mod, you can capture hundreds of different well-modeled wild Pokémon (the AllTheMons datapack adds many more too), grow berries, apricorns and herbs, or go fossil hunting to revive ancient Pokémon that are now extinct.
You'll also have to battle trainers to get stronger and stronger, but never fear: All this takes place in a peaceful universe where no hostile monsters will bother you.

![underwater pokémon](https://i.imgur.com/2OsUDet.png)![forest pokémon](https://i.imgur.com/zwgRgIE.png)

## Encouraging exploration

The world that awaits you will be rich in discoveries and new biomes, but exploration will be facilitated by the multiple means of locomotion available to you. Ride your sturdiest Pokémon, build great ships or take to the skies in airships... it's up to you!

![river](https://i.imgur.com/e7pkuTl.png)![plane](https://i.imgur.com/uwEmoJm.png)

## Technological resources

The Immersive Enginnering mod brings you into the modern world. Everything has been done to ensure that as many things as possible can be automated, thanks to exclusive integrations (such as Cobblemon plants, which can be grown in garden cloches, for example).

![water wheel](https://i.imgur.com/3ycsTWB.png)![factory](https://i.imgur.com/n5Em1xW.png)

## Elegance

You'll be able to build in the best possible conditions, thanks to mods such as Framed Blocks and LittleTiles, as well as decorate your cozy dwelling with elegant furniture and objects.
And don't worry about yourself: you can be just as beautiful as your home thanks to Armorer's Workshop mod.

![decorated facade](https://i.imgur.com/DsuSTMc.png)![cozy room](https://i.imgur.com/CR7ygS8.png)

## Exploration Update !

Update 1.1.0 focuses on exploration!
New structures and new means of locomotion are here, and you can create teleportation portals with the Wormhole mod!

![portal](https://i.imgur.com/ytW3YjJ.png)![end tower](https://i.imgur.com/ufCgkTu.png)

## Twilight Update !

With update 1.2.0, you'll be able to enter the Twilight Forest!
Discover new, forgotten Pokémon forms.

![twilight forest 1](https://i.imgur.com/cXhwDSK.png)![twilight forest 2](https://i.imgur.com/qPeqPsr.png)

### Have fun and catch 'em all!

##
